title: potentilla brevicaulis
intro: Potentilla brevicaulis, also known as Dwarf Cinquefoil, is a perennial herb belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) with a short stature and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. Some of the health benefits attributed to Potentilla brevicaulis include the ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Potentilla brevicaulis can be made by infusing the dried flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by mixing the plant material with other herbs to create a tincture or topical cream.
